message:
test: add 32 malformed input tolerance tests for all 14 providers

Verifies every provider handles empty files, binary garbage, truncated
JSON, and mixed valid/invalid content without panicking. Tests cover
JSONL, JSON, markdown, and SQLite providers.

Also closes mock-replacement track: pipeline mocks supplemented with
real-provider tests; discovery/scalability mocks retained (justified).

Total: 701 tests, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
